text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the start of the new year, Kitasan Black
enters her classic year, a very important period
for an Umamusume's racing career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to come up with concrete goals if we
hope to make great strides this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle, rattle!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year, Trainer! There's no time to
waste! Let's come up with some New Year's
resolutions right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't say I'm surprised by how proactive Kitasan
Black is. If there's one thing she's always got an
abundance of, it's the determination to keep
improving.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Right then, let's get going! We're going to visit
my home!

text_block_list.name: Apprentices
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Master!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suddenly find myself dragged to a New Year's
party at Kitasan Black's home. Upon arriving, her
father's top apprentice comes to greet us.

text_block_list.name: Top Apprentice
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year, Miss Kitasan!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year to you too. This is my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
We're here today to declare our New Year's
resolution to Dad!

text_block_list.name: Top Apprentice
text_block_list.text: Hm, I see... In that case, instead of simply stating your resolution...

text_block_list.name: Top Apprentice
text_block_list.text: Why don't you demonstrate to us just how passionate you are by singing together?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A duet with Trainer?! I don't know how I feel
about singing in front of Dad and all of you...
That's pretty nerve-racking.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But I do wanna pour my heart and wishes into a
song! What do you think, Trainer? Are you on
board with me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The prospect of singing in front of professional
singers is terrifying, but I muster up the courage
and consign myself to performing with her.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hm, which one do you think we should do,
Trainer? This one? Or this one? Or maybe this
one?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black suggests three options for me to
pick from. I decide to go with...
choice_data_list: A one-hour medley of her father's songs.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
"Gone in a Flash", huh? You chose an interesting
one! Let's go with this, then!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: The day we met, you and I shared glances. ♪
choice_data_list:
And there we fell in love, in the blink of an
eye! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Then you leeeft! Aaah! The person I loved was
gone in a flash! ♪

text_block_list.name: Top Apprentice
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You two were in perfect harmony with each
other.

text_block_list.name: Top Apprentice
text_block_list.text:
Only a true speedster can disappear in a flash like
that. Do your best to show your father the same
speed in your races this year!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Will do! And that's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's sprint through this year so fast, no
one can even see me coming!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black makes a promise for the upcoming
year, swearing that she'll sprint past her foes and
leave them all in the dust!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a one-hour medley of my dad's songs! Great
choice!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I can sing every song from memory!
Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, after an hour of passionate singing...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Phew! That felt great! Thank you all for listening!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Top Apprentice
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You both have incredible stamina! It's
astounding that you were able to sing through
every last song.

text_block_list.name: Top Apprentice
text_block_list.text:
I think that proves you won't have trouble seeing
this racing season through to the end either. Now
relax and enjoy your time home!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Trainer, let's go all out this year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We promise to stay strong until the very end this
year, just like we did with the medley, and spend
the rest of our time relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, "Mother, I Am the Ocean"! This one covers
an immense range of notes! All right, let's get
started!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I aaaaam the ocean! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Swallow all your sorrows! ♪ Overcome every
mountain! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: And live ooon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Top Apprentice
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you two were fantastic! That was a
positively majestic performance.

text_block_list.name: Top Apprentice
text_block_list.text:
Go out there and show your father just how firmly
you'll both stand in the face of your challenges
this year!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's get ready to make waves even
bigger than the ocean this year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The new year ignites the burning spirit in our
hearts, and we're ready to take any challenge
head-on!
